title: SLGG SMP Roleplay
description: Custom models and music for SLGG SMP Server
body:
An always changing resource pack to be used on the SLGG SMP.

This mainly include alternate models, to be used as role-play items, blocks, music and instruments.

## Installation
Make sure you install this pack both as a Resource Pack and a Data Pack! Without the Data Pack, recipes and custom music discs will not work.

## Included 

Currently includes
* Hotdog - `slgg:hotdog`
* Coins - `slgg:coin_gold`, `slgg:coin_silver`, `slgg:coin_bronze`
* "Nexus Plaza: Let's Begin!" music disc

## Usage

Easiest access the custom models is 
```
/give @p beef[minecraft:item_model="slgg:hotdog"]
```

For custom music discs, there are crafting recipes, or it can be spawned with `/function new_music:music_nexus_plaza`
